india_trends.title: Silver price today: White metal rebounds to ₹2.35 lakh/kg as dollar falls after Federal Reserve rate decision
india_trends.summary: Silver prices in India recovered on Thursday after reaching a one-month low, supported by a weaker U.S. dollar. However, high crude oil prices raise inflation concerns, impacting interest rates. MCX silver rose 1% to ₹2,35,102 per kg, while gold prices remained stable.

india_trends.title: Gold rate up on MCX after US Fed hold rates steady; a sharp jump in crude oil prices raises inflation fears
india_trends.summary: Gold rate climbed on MCX on Thursday morning after the US Fed held rates steady. The US Federal Reserve on 29 April kept the federal funds rate unchanged for the third consecutive policy at 3.5%–3.75%.
